title: Surgeon Vacancy at Tata Memorial Centre - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Tata Memorial Centre - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Tata Memorial Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Memorial Centre:
Tata Memorial Centre is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Memorial Centre!
